title: Mokani Canvas for Painting, 6 Packs Blank Canvas Panels Board - 20x20cm (8x8), Cotton Art Canvases for Acrylic, Oil Painting, Ideal Art Supplies for Professional Artist, Hobby Painters & Beginners
features: 【Product Information】Package includes 6 pieces painting canvas. Size: 20x20cm (8x8"), thickness: 2.5mm. Blank Canvas Panels Board for Acrylic, Oil, Watercolour Painting. Ideal art supplies for professional artist, hobby painters & beginners

【Professional Triple-Primed Art Canvas】These small cotton canvases for painting feature a 3-layer primer for superior paint adhesion, penetration resistance and surface smoothness. This premium treatment delivers an exceptional painting experience while significantly extending the canvas's service life.

【Individually Plastic-Wrapped】 Each blank canvas of art is individually plastic-wrapped to protect against dust, moisture, and scratches. Prevent unnecessary exposure of unused canvases, which may affect the quality of canvas panels. Convenient to store and carry. Simply peel and start painting - no preparation needed!

【Premium Quality Canvases】 Made from cotton fabric, these canvases for painting are acid-free and easy to dye. 2.5mm thick blank canvas prevents bending, breakage, and paint leakage. Reinforced edges ensure a flat surface for smooth canvas paper art creation.
【Ideal Gift】These blank canvases are perfect as birthday or Christmas gifts, ideal for daily practice, outdoor sketching and home decoration projects.
